items.name: Glasses
items.description:
These Sience Glasses bring a smart and tech-inspired look to your avatar. With a sleek frame and subtle scientific flair, they’re ideal for role-play, tech-themed outfits, or casual everyday wear. Whether you’re in the lab, exploring virtual worlds, or simply upgrading your avatar’s style—hese glasses are a cool accessory everyone will notice.

✅ Join the Group: https://www.roblox.com/communities/12034553/Classic-Limiteds#!/about

🏛️ Classic Limiteds

items.description:

Created for special nights, countdown kisses, and iconic looks this collection celebrates fresh beginnings with style and glow.
Made in partnership with Valmon, bringing together creativity, elegance, and modern fashion for your Roblox avatar.

items.name: Bunny Bliss Pierced Beanie
items.description:
Hop into style with the Bunny Bliss Pierced Beanie, a playful and edgy twist on a classic accessory. This cozy beanie features adorable bunny ears that add a whimsical touch to your look, while the surrounding piercings deliver a bold, modern edge. Crafted from high-quality, soft fabric, it ensures both comfort and standout style. Perfect for adding a unique flair to your Roblox avatar or making a statement in any casual outfit, the Bunny Bliss Pierced Beanie combines fun and fashion in one irresistible package. Embrace the ultimate fusion of cute and cool with this must-have beanie.
